base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of rydia_adult — a character (playable) from 1991 final fantasy iv. Rydia (adult) — Summoner. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Rydia (adult) — Summoner; Mist-village survivor. Adult form after Feymarch growth
